chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P No.S-14 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.36/2025 (Ex/A) 2. For hearing of main case 02-5-2025 Mr. Ghazanfar Abbas Jatoi, Advocate for the petitioner -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Through instant petition, the petitioners have sought for protection. Perusal of record reflects that the petitioners have already approached the Court of the Additional Sessions Judge-II/ Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Khairpur where learned Ex-Officio Justice of Peace vide order dated 24-09-2024, passed in Cr. Misc. Application No.4071/2024, has provided protection to them but in spite of that they have approached this Court for protection. Since, protection has already been provided to the petitioners by learned Additional Sessions Judge-II/ Ex-Officio Justice of Peace, Khairpur vide order dated 24-09-2024; thus, under the circumstances, the instant petition being not maintainable is hereby dismissed in limine along with listed application. J U D G E Naveed Ali
